name: Tagarno
title: Product overview: Digital microscopes | TAGARNO
bodyText: Industries Products Resources Contact EN FR DE DA Industries Digital microscopes Software Accessories Contact Other things to explore Ressources Support and updates TAGARNO digital microscopes Compare the TAGARNO microscopes side-by-side or use the filters to find the right microscope for your needs. Magnification UP TO 53X UP TO 133X UP TO 330X UP TO 660X On-board applications YES NO Integrated light YES NO Image capture BUILT-IN USB 3.0 WITH GENERIC DRIVERS BOTH Camera quality 4K FHD ZIP+ Entry level model for high quality magnification tasks where no on-board apps are required Get price Learn more about product ZAP+ Microscope with multiple mounting options for high quality magnification tasks where no on-board apps are required Get price Learn more about product TREND+ This bestseller with on-board apps is perfect for large and small samples due to the long camera arm that can be turned away when not in use Get price Learn more about product T50 4K microscope with motorized height adjustment, unique accessories and on-board apps for an extraordinary user experience. Get price Learn more about product PRESTIGE Discontinued in April 2026. Get price Learn more about product No microscopes available Unfortunately, no microscope matches your filters. Show all microscopes Book a free consultation with a microscopy expert Choosing the right digital microscope depends on your specific tasks and requirements. In a one-on-one meeting, our specialists will guide you through your options, answer your questions, and help you find the ideal solution for your application. When you fill out this form, you will receive a booking link to the calendar of your local consultant so you can book a meeting at a time that suits you. This offer is currently exclusively available for customers in Germany, Switzerland, Austria., Hungary, and United States of America. Other customers are encouraged to fill out a regular contact form.
